title: Rhythm: news headline practice
description: Mixed-case prose with proper punctuation — like reading headlines
text: Breaking: SpaceX Launches Starship at 12:30 PM. Markets React: Apple Up 3%, Tesla Down 2%. Meanwhile, Scientists Discover New Planet — "Truly Remarkable!"
tips: Title Case: First Letter Of Each Word Capitalized
Real news patterns — % symbols, times, em dashes
Steady tempo for long mixed text

character_tips.anna: News headline style — practice for content writers and journalists.
character_tips.maxim: Title case + numbers + punctuation = professional writing flow.
